task:
Write a complete Next.js 16 Server Component at app/design-1/_components/Gallery.tsx that renders the IRON design's Gallery section. Output ONLY the .tsx file contents — no markdown fences, no explanation, no preamble. === AVAILABLE TAILWIND TOKENS === Colors: bg-iron-bg #0e0e0e, bg-iron-panel #171717, bg-iron-card #1d1d1d, border-iron-line #2a2a2a, text-iron-paper / text-iron-text #f4f0e8, text-iron-text-dim #9a958c, text-iron-text-muted #5e5b54, bg-iron-orange / text-iron-orange #ff5b1f. Fonts: font-iron-display (Archivo Black), font-iron-body (Archivo), font-iron-mono (JetBrains Mono). === AVAILABLE COMPONENT === import Eyebrow from './Eyebrow'; // import Image from 'next/image'; // Use next/image for all images. === STRUCTURE === Section: border-b border-iron-line, px-6 py-16 lg:px-14 lg:py-[110px]. Header row (flex, items-end, justify-between, mb-14): - Left: then h2 'No frills. Just iron.' (font-iron-display, text-5xl lg:text-6xl, leading-[0.95], tracking-tight, mt-5) - Right (max-w-xs, text-iron-text-dim, text-base, leading-relaxed, font-iron-body): 'Two racks, sled, rower, dumbbells to 100, plenty of platform space. Climate-controlled. Free parking.' Photo grid: grid grid-cols-[2fr_1fr_1fr], grid-rows-[240px_240px], gap-3 Slot 1 (col-1, row-span-2, border border-iron-line, overflow-hidden, relative): Image: src='https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1534438327276-14e5300c3a48?w=1400&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop', fill, sizes='(max-width:1024px) 100vw, 50vw', object-cover, alt='Squat rack and lifting platform' Slot 2 (border border-iron-line, overflow-hidden, relative): Image: src='https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517836357463-d25dfeac3438?w=800&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop', fill, sizes='25vw', object-cover, alt='Dumbbell rack detail' Slot 3 (border border-iron-line, overflow-hidden, relative): Image: src='https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1571019613454-1cb2f99b2d8b?w=800&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop', fill, sizes='25vw', object-cover, alt='Coach cueing a client' Slot 4 (border border-iron-line, overflow-hidden, relative): Image: src='https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1540497077202-7c8a3999166f?w=800&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop', fill, sizes='25vw', object-cover, alt='Sled conditioning drill' Slot 5 (border border-iron-line, overflow-hidden, relative): Image: src='https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1593079831268-3381b0db4a77?w=800&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop', fill, sizes='25vw', object-cover, alt='Workout of the day whiteboard' === CONSTRAINTS === - Server Component (no 'use client'). - Imports: only 'next/image' and './Eyebrow'. - Semantic HTML:
wrapper, use
